step_rationale: Long non-coding RNA with roles in inflammatory response and cardiac remodeling post-MI.
mechanism: SNHG7 regulates inflammatory pathways and myocardial remodeling relevant to acute coronary syndrome progression.

references.title: Long non-coding RNA SNHG7 serves as a diagnostic biomarker for acute coronary syndrome and its predictive value for the clinical outcome after percutaneous coronary intervention.
